Subscriber.title: Subscriber
Subscriber.description: A person who has subscribed to the newsletter.

email.description: The email address of the subscriber.

subscribedAt.description: The date and time the subscription was created.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: A message in a chat conversation.

userId.description: The ID of the user who sent the message.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

content.description: The text content of the message.

timestamp.description: The time the message was sent.

friction.description: The friction level for this message.

persona.description: The persona used for this message.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

/users/{userId}/chats/{chatId}.description: Subcollection of chat messages for a user.
